title: task
description:
Add a dedicated SCHC rule in schc.c for OSCORE-protected CoAP packets. The OSCORE Object-Security option appears as a CoAP option that needs specialized compression handling.

Wire format of OSCORE-protected CoAP:
- Standard CoAP header (4 bytes)
- Object-Security option with kid_context, partial_iv, sender_id
- Encrypted CoAP payload

The rule must be added to both C and Python implementations to maintain interoperability:
- lichen/subsys/lichen/schc/schc.c
- python/src/lichen/schc/rules.py

Reference: spec/06-security.md section 8.7 - OSCORE overhead is 8-13 bytes

Parent: project-LICHEN-r6fu.2
